# CWE-349 safe — Acceptance of Extraneous Untrusted Data With Trusted Data (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-349-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) First(dest interface{}, conds ...interface{}) error { return nil }

type SignedBundle struct {
	TrustedAdmin bool `json:"trusted_admin"`
	Profile      struct {
		ID   string `json:"id"`
		Role string `json:"role"`
	} `json:"profile"`
}

func PromoteFromBundle(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	var bundle SignedBundle
	if err := json.NewDecoder(c.Request.Body).Decode(&bundle); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if !bundle.TrustedAdmin {
		return errors.New("untrusted bundle")
	}
	if bundle.Profile.Role != "support" {
		return errors.New("role not allowed from trusted channel")
	}
	return db.First(nil, "UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", bundle.Profile.Role, bundle.Profile.ID)
}
